citation_label: Appropriation Act, 2024 (Act No. 29 of 2024) — FY2025 expenditure authority
heading: Appropriation Act, 2024 (Act No. 29 of 2024) — FY2025 expenditure authority

metadata.source_note: Appropriation Act, 2024 (Act No. 29 of 2024) assented print from the National Assembly repository (text-embedded). Authorizes expenditure from the Consolidated Fund for the financial year ending 31 December 2025 (aggregate K217,105,378,661), including the head under which the Ministry of Community Development and Social Services funds the Social Cash Transfer - the statutory authority anchor for the policy-class SCT transfer-values capture.
metadata.title: Appropriation Act, 2024 (Act No. 29 of 2024) — FY2025 expenditure authority

body:
Appropriation

[No. 29 of 2024 405 An Act to authorise expenditure from the Consolidated Fund of monies required for the services of the Republic during the financial year ending on 31st December, 2025, not exceeding in the aggregate two hundred and seventeen billion, one hundred five million, three hundred seventy- eight thousand, six hundred and sixty-one kwacha. [26th December, 2024 ENACTED by the Parliament of Zambia. 1. This Act may be cited as the Appropriation Act, 2024. 2. (1) On the authority of a warrant issued by the President, there may be expended from the Consolidated Fund, such monies, not exceeding in the aggregate two hundred and seventeen billion, one hundred five million, three hundred seventy eight thousand, six hundred and sixty-one kwacha as may be required for the services of the Republic during the financial year ending on 31st December, 2025. (2) The monies referred to in subsection (1) shall be appropriated to the services of the Republic specified in the second column of the Schedule in amounts not exceeding the amounts indicated in the third column of the Schedule. (3) On the written authority of the Secretary to the Treasury, the amounts shown under the programmes in the Schedule, may be varied, except that the amounts appropriated to each programme in the Schedule shall not be altered by the variation. Enactment Short title Appropriation GOVERNMENT OF ZAMBIA ACT No. 29 of 2024 Date of Assent: 20th December, 2024 Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer, P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K 20.00 each.
